73685.subject: Donald Trump’s approval rating hits an all-time low
73685.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODl9AAcAAAAAAe_6Onc3BPnI3G4oq9wD5BO_2jptoxpE5drArd-KjfTLCMVTx32hpNpy9l6GG-Z_RlH0WKy_l8G6pwBg-TqMKktoyJPyxS2rMWQbD6tDXQIN9g 

May 27th 2026

 

 
 
 

 The Economist Today
 


 Our best journalism, handpicked each day
 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODl9AAcAAAAAAe_6Onc48_Gnhb6C13gzDdyYIq9W8X_hXHGl0Z4UjOtcyuY1E8qJyqwCWrvcfOH9HeaHP2sK87xJVzxEhWv7YjPQa6siba0w_qcW5n0jwujorA 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODl9AAcAAAAAAe_6Onc5zJ-WsXIqstYxMbuHTQHBQjRFo6hpbK5X-ZLATydVDVlvUPMiDffN20GMxH_x6e43PzW59X3jzaTdiDEDYQUDCxNuNae3I-Mt_Ppw8g 



 
 

Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



Each week The Economist and YouGov ask Americans what they make of their president. The latest survey shows Donald Trump has passed a milestone: he is the most unpopular Oval Office occupant since our poll began in 2009. War in Iran has hurt Mr Trump’s standing, but it is his handling of the economy (which cannot be separated from his foreign policy) that is really dragging him down. Dig into the polling data in 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODl9AAcAAAAAAe_6Onc6itkyTFVZyrTV1-toTKMHomBeWzYgEhqwdPmJf_QvwHA4CPRY4VIKiC6dM4_37fwQ6pQJ3O3IuQ46JgJVIisDKR8TLlbCVIQt 
our Trump tracker .


And Ukraine has achieved something extraordinary simply by remaining sovereign. But survival alone is not victory. Our correspondent the

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-may-27-oleh-bezuhlyi-1oqtf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B9LE4WzW3Si6ZgBAroqDPQw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3810PqF4vdFIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpo9joy6~31-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpo9joy6-31
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Today’s market mood is one of disciplined institutional expansion. While global payout rails and corporate treasuries reach new milestones, regulatory friction in Washington persists, and mysterious whale activity adds a touch of classic crypto uncertainty. 🌐Circle and Nium Partner for Global Stablecoin Payouts in 190 Countries Circle and Nium have launched a partnership to connect USDC settlement with global payout rails across 190 countries and 100 currencies. The integration allows financial institutions to bypass traditional prefunding requirements, enabling real-time cross-border payments via the Circle Payments Network. Read full story 🏛️Ripple National Trust Bank Charter Triggers Congressional Scrutiny Ripple’s move to join federal banking infrastructure with a national trust charter is now live, aiming to hold RLUSD reserves directly at the Federal Reserve. However, Senator Elizabeth Warren has formally challenged the legality of the OCC's approval, sparking a high-stakes regulatory battle over "crypto banks." See details 🛑SEC Pauses "Innovation Exemption" for Third-Party Tokenized Stocks The SEC has halted a controversial plan that would have allowed crypto-native platforms to trade tokenized versions of public stocks without the issuer’s consent. The decision follows intense lobbying from traditional exchanges like Nasdaq and the NYSE, which cited risks of market fragmentation and investor protection gaps. Read full story 💳Coinbase Taps Standard Chartered to Expand Institutional Fiat Rails Coinbase has integrated Standard Chartered’s banking infrastructure to offer multi-currency funding and settlement for institutional clients. The partnership adds support for AUD, SGD, CAD, and CHF, allowing global trading desks to manage capital efficiency without forced foreign exchange conversions through a single base currency. See details 🔥Satoshi-Era Bitcoin Whale Burns $8.3 Million in BTC Supply In a rare on-chain event, five dormant wallets dating back to 2014 simultaneously transferred 107 BTC to a well-known burn address. This permanent removal of $8.3 million from the circulating supply has sparked intense speculation among analysts regarding the motive behind this irreversible "exit" from the network. Read full story 💰Strive Treasury Reaches 16,500 BTC with New $85 Million Purchase Publicly tra

73677.subject: The Slow Bleed
73677.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

==Hi all, happy Wednesday! Today, we're diving into the crypto market's slow bleed, analyzing why compressed spot volume and ask-skewed order books point to a protracted distribution regime. We also break down the SEC’s delayed innovation exemption for tokenized stocks and what the regulatory pause means for onchain equity markets.==

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Bitcoin is trading at ~$77K this morning, and the order book is quietly telling a story the price tape isn't. Trusted spot volume has compressed back to levels last seen in 2023, while passive sellers continue to dominate the top of book at every price point below $80K. The setup is a slow-bleed structure, not a capitulation one.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/60b48249-f11e-49d7-8808-c3015acc6561/image.png?t=1779878826)
Caption: 

BTC's 30-day average trusted spot volume has fallen to roughly $5B per day, down from a peak above $25B in late 2024 / early 2025 (a ~75% drawdown in activity). ETH has tracked the same path, compressing from ~$13B at peak to ~$3B today. Futures show the same shape on a larger absolute base: BTC notional has come in from a $90B+ peak to roughly $45-50B, with ETH retreating from its late-2025 spike near $100B back below $40B. SOL volume, both spot and futures, is making fresh local lows. Across the curve, this is the lowest aggregate engagement the majors have seen in this cycle outside the 2022-2023 bear. 

Thin tape on its own is not a directional signal. What makes the current regime worth flagging is what's happening at the top of the book.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b835007a-9bf2-4d85-8692-cd96d75858a6/image.png?t=1779878826)
Caption: 

Aggregating bid and ask depth within 50 bps of mid across major venues, the order book has run persistently ask-skewed since the start of the year. The deepest dips (readings of -10% to nearly -20%), where ask-side depth dwarfs bids, have clustered in the windows where BTC is around $80K. Bid-side spikes still occur, but they are shorter-lived and shallower than the ask-side accumulation. At every fade rally toward the $80K handle, market makers are restocking offers faster than dip buyers are restocking bids.

This is what a distribution regime tends to look like in the data before it shows up in price. Spot volume is too thin to absorb a determined seller with

73671.subject: 😱 All of DeFi is at risk
73671.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $75,645 (-1.9%) | **ETH** $2,077 (-2.0%) | **SOL** $84 (-1.6%)

* OpenZepplin’s founder states that[ “all of DeFi is unsafe”](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059536629967274416?s=20) due to increased capability of AI coding agents

* Micron (MU) [gains 6% after hours](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2059454290100387887?s=20) after gaining 19% on the day

* Strive’s SATA yield product generates enough volume above par to [acquire 539 BTC](https://x.com/piovincenzo_/status/2059380371838419370?s=20)

* Cumulative HYPE ETF [inflows surpass $100M](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2059421372531581048?s=20) — BTC ETFs record 7th consecutive day of [net outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059553489345515577?s=20) — [$1.3B worth](https://x.com/EricBalchunas/status/2059378201432866867?s=20) of IBIT shares get dumped

* Banca Sella becomes first Italian bank to offer [crypto services](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2059582938296324156?s=20)

* The Pump Fun app expands to [ETH, Base, and BNB](https://x.com/Pumpfun/status/2059299822130074024?s=20)

* US Government awards [$2.29B contract](https://x.com/tokens/status/2059402643429306596?s=20) to SpaceX for low Earth orbit space data network

* Trump says CFTC should have [exclusive authority](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2059384108325998606?s=20) over prediction markets — Says crypto is a major industry and the [US must protect it](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2059384986969464854?s=20)

* [UK sanctions HTX](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2059272479240011892?s=20) crypto exchange due to “supporting the government of Russia”

* Victor Wembanyama rookie card[ sells for $5.1M](https://x.com/CardsMax/status/2059251259954135484?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/all-of-defi-is-at-risk
